name: Monaco Editor

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need VS Code-fidelity code viewing (minimap, code folding, syntax coloring) or a read-only comparison; however, it is extremely heavy (4MB+, injects 100+ styles into document.head, includes a web worker and 95 dynamic imports), so the only clean portable use is a single read-only editor in a full-page artifact. Use codemirror for lightweight embeddable/editable code, or codemirror-merge for plain side-by-side diffs--prefer those for widgets (shadow) and strict CSP.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot draw a minimap or reproduce the VS Code look, but Monaco is the entire VS Code editing engine, not a component that lands painlessly from a CDN: it injects CSS into the host head, uses workers for diffs/language services, and dynamically imports language packs--directly conflicting with this project's "zero-footprint Shadow DOM + strict CSP" model. It is therefore cataloged as too heavy and requiring a fork/bundle for reliable embedding.

data_in.note: Read-only viewing uses a single editor (editor.create); side-by-side/inline diff uses editor.createDiffEditor. Diff calculation depends on the editor web worker and may fail under strict CSP or without a real worker. language is a Monaco language id; Monarch highlighting runs on the main thread without a worker.

schema.value: string -- full code text (the modified side in diff mode)
schema.language?: string -- Monaco language id (such as 'javascript'/'python'/'json'), default 'plaintext'
schema.readOnly?: boolean -- boot default true (positioned as a viewer)
schema.minimap?: boolean -- Monaco's signature minimap, default true
schema.diff?: { original: string } -- when provided, uses createDiffEditor with value as the modified side; diff calculation requires a web worker

spec.note: Monaco reads the container size, so it needs an explicit pixel height (default 480px); automaticLayout:true is recommended to follow size changes. Rule 3 prohibits vh/percentage height.

when_to_use: 需要 VS Code 保真度的代码查看(minimap、代码折叠、语法着色)或只读对比时用它;但它极重(4MB+、向 document.head 注入 100+ 样式、含 web worker 与 95 处动态 import),干净可移植的用法仅限「整页 artifact 里的只读单编辑器」。要轻量可嵌入/可编辑用 codemirror;纯并排代码 diff 用 codemirror-merge——widget(shadow)与严格 CSP 优先选它们。
why_valuable: AI 画不出 minimap 与 VS Code 级观感,但 Monaco 是整台 VS Code 编辑引擎、不是可无痛 CDN 落地的组件:它把 CSS 注入宿主 head、用 worker 算 diff/语言服务、按需动态 import 语言包——与本项目「Shadow DOM 零足迹 + 严格 CSP」硬冲突,故按「过重、需 fork/打包才能可靠嵌入」收录。

data_in.note: 只读查看走单编辑器(editor.create);并排/行内 diff 走 editor.createDiffEditor——注意 diff 计算依赖 editor web worker,严格 CSP/无真实 worker 时 diff 可能算不出。language 是 Monaco 语言 id;monarch 着色走主线程无需 worker。

schema.value: string —— 代码全文(diff 模式作为 modified 一侧)
schema.language?: string —— Monaco 语言 id(如 'javascript'/'python'/'json'),默认 'plaintext'
schema.readOnly?: boolean —— boot 默认 true(定位为查看器)
schema.minimap?: boolean —— Monaco 招牌 minimap,默认 true
schema.diff?: { original: string } —— 提供则用 createDiffEditor,value 作为 modified 一侧;diff 计算需 web worker

spec.note: Monaco 读容器尺寸,须显式像素高度(默认 480px)并建议 automaticLayout:true 跟随尺寸;禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: 常被误当轻量组件;minimal 钉死「只读单编辑器 + minimap」这一最可行用法,diff 需 worker 另说。

uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;只读查看无需回传,如需取内容读 editor 实例的 getValue()。
uplink.widget: 不推荐在 widget 用;若用,消费 AI 自行读 editor.getValue() 再拼 sendPrompt。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 读 editor.getValue() 后自行调用 sendFollowUpMessage。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:仅整页只读查看较可行;样式注入本页 head 尚可接受,但 95 处动态 import 语言包与 worker 在严格 CSP 下可能失败
carriers.widget: unsupported:向 document.head 注入 100+ 样式无法留在 shadow(违反铁律 2),且依赖 worker 与动态 import;需 fork/打包才能勉强适配
carriers.codex: conditional:sandbox iframe 内 head 注入自包含,只读查看可行;diff/语言服务需 MonacoEnvironment.getWorker 返回真实 worker

isolation.evidence: monaco-editor@0.56.0 +esm (4.18 MB) exports named `editor`(Hu), `languages`(me), `Uri`, `Range`, `Position`, `KeyCode`, `KeyMod` etc — import {editor} correct (no default). editor.api.d.ts: create(domElement, options?:IStandaloneEditorConstructionOptions):IStandaloneCodeEditor (L950); createDiffEditor(domElement, options?):IStandaloneDiffEditor (L980); createModel(value, language?, uri?) (L1032); createWebWorker (L1101). globalStyleInjection=YES: bundle has 102 `document.head` + 98 `getElementsByTagName("head")` references — Monaco injects its editor CSS into the host document head and cannot redirect it to a shadowRoot without forking its CSS loader, violating repo iron-law #2. globalDomMutation=YES: 511 appendChild incl. overlay/measure/context-menu widgets attached to document.body. globalEvents=YES: window + document-level resize/focus/key/pointer listeners. Worker: getWorker/getWorkerUrl/MonacoEnvironment/new Worker present — the editor web worker backs diff computation and language services; without a real MonacoEnvironment.getWorker those degrade/fail (a no-op stub lets a read-only single editor render but disables diff). 95 dynamic import() calls lazy-load language/feature chunks — under strict artifact/widget CSP these chunk fetches may be blocked. Net: not a clean Shadow-DOM/CSP drop-in → app-needs-fork; only a full-page read-only viewer is plausibly usable (inferred-not-tested).
